input.business_objective: Launch awareness campaign for new developer onboarding product targeting engineering leaders
input.product_description: Developer onboarding automation platform that reduces time-to-first-commit for new engineers from 2 weeks to 3 days
input.icp_data: CTOs and VPs of Engineering at Series B+ SaaS companies, 50-300 engineers, hiring 5+ engineers per quarter
existing_customer_outcomes: Carta reduced new engineer time-to-productivity by 65%
Plaid onboards 20 engineers/month with zero dedicated DevEx headcount

output.objective: Generate 100 demo requests from CTOs and VPs of Engineering at Series B+ SaaS companies (50-300 engineers) by Q3 end at CPL under $250

target_audience.persona_description: Alex is a VP of Engineering at a 150-person Series B SaaS company. They're hiring 3-4 engineers per month and have no dedicated DevEx team. New hires spend their first two weeks reading wikis and waiting for access. Alex knows this is a problem — they've heard the complaints — but it's not their top priority because 'it's always been this way.' They follow engineering blogs, occasionally post on LinkedIn about team building, and spend time in Slack communities. They evaluate tools by whether their lead engineer will adopt them without a fight.
pain_points: New hires take 2+ weeks to become productive — cost of delay compounds with hiring pace
The wiki is always out of date and no one has time to maintain it
Onboarding is inconsistent — different managers do it differently, so quality varies

output.key_message: Engineering teams that hire fast can't afford a 2-week onboarding tax — we cut it to 3 days, automatically.
supporting_messages: Carta reduced new engineer time-to-first-commit by 65% without adding DevEx headcount
Setup takes one afternoon: connect your GitHub, Jira, and Confluence — the system builds itself
Engineers adopt it because it makes THEIR first week better, not just the manager's tracking spreadsheet

tone.we_are: Engineers who understand how painful bad onboarding is and built the thing we wish existed
tone.we_are_not: An HR software company that added a developer onboarding checkbox to an existing product

channel_mix.rationale: Searches for 'developer onboarding automation', 'reduce engineer ramp time', 'internal developer portal' indicate active evaluation mode.

channel_mix.role: Awareness — reach VPs Eng actively posting about team scaling
channel_mix.rationale: Engineering leaders at growth-stage companies are active on LinkedIn. Can layer company size + recent hiring growth signal via targeting.
LeadDev and ELC newsletters are read by exactly this ICP. Sponsorship reaches them in a content-consumption context vs. an ad-scrolling context.

success_metrics.measurement: Form submissions tagged as VP Eng / CTO in HubSpot
LinkedIn Campaign Manager CTR on sponsored content
Google Ads impression share on branded + category keywords

output.constraints: No mention of specific competitor names. Carta case study cleared for use — use 65% stat only, do not cite specific team size. All developer tools screenshots must show real UI (no mocked dashboards). Technical copy must be reviewed by an engineer before publishing.
